race.comment: SPHERE (9) city placed filly resuming. Shouldn't be a Maiden for long this time in and wasn't asked to do much in her two trials. Nose roll goes on and will take catching. WILTSHIRE LASS (10) failed to come up in the two runs last prep and resumes today. Given the two trials in readiness for this and gets every chance from the low draw. Each way. BETTER BLOOM (1) gave a glimpse of what she's capable of last time in when placing over the 1200m here. Looks ready to go after the two trials and maps to stalk the speed. MARK OF GLORY (6) is a well-bred three-year-old I Am Invincible filly resuming. Failed to come up in her first prep and expect to see her make sharp improvement this time in. Given the two trials and the cross over nose band goes on.
